languages.text: Сотни мелких крюков впились в плоть и терзали жертву, пока та не истекла кровью. На удивление, раны продолжают сочиться — от бурой крови с едва заметным аметистовым оттенком исходит странный аромат.

traits.locale_text: Сотни мелких крюков впились в плоть и терзали жертву, пока та не истекла кровью. На удивление, раны продолжают сочиться — от бурой крови с едва заметным аметистовым оттенком исходит странный аромат.
Сотни мелких крюков впились в плоть и терзали жертву, пока та не истекла кровью. На удивление, раны продолжают сочиться — от бурой крови с едва заметным аметистовым оттенком исходит странный аромат.

languages.text: A hundred of small hooks burrowed into the flesh and tormented the victim until it bled out. Surprisingly, the wounds are still weeping brownish liquid with a barely noticeable amethyst hue and an exotic fragrance.
languages.original_text: Сотни мелких крюков впились в плоть и терзали жертву, пока та не истекла кровью. На удивление, раны продолжают сочиться — от бурой крови с едва заметным аметистовым оттенком исходит странный аромат.

traits.locale_text: A hundred of small hooks burrowed into the flesh and tormented the victim until it bled out. Surprisingly, the wounds are still weeping brownish liquid with a barely noticeable amethyst hue and an exotic fragrance.

A hundred of small hooks burrowed into the flesh and tormented the victim until it bled out. Surprisingly, the wounds are still weeping brownish liquid with a barely noticeable amethyst hue and an exotic fragrance.

A hundred of small hooks burrowed into the flesh and tormented the victim until it bled out. Surprisingly, the wounds are still weeping brownish liquid with a barely noticeable amethyst hue and an exotic fragrance.

languages.text: Hunderte von kleinen Haken bohrten sich in das Fleisch und quälten das Opfer, bis es verblutete. Überraschenderweise triefen die Wunden immer noch bräunliche Flüssigkeit mit einem kaum wahrnehmbaren amethystfarbenen Ton und einem exotischen Duft.
languages.original_text: A hundred of small hooks burrowed into the flesh and tormented the victim until it bled out. Surprisingly, the wounds are still weeping brownish liquid with a barely noticeable amethyst hue and an exotic fragrance.

languages.text: Une centaine de petits crochets se sont enfoncés dans la chair et ont tourmenté la victime jusqu'à ce qu'elle se vide de son sang. Étonnamment, les plaies suintent encore un liquide brunâtre d'une teinte améthyste à peine perceptible et d'un parfum exotique.
languages.original_text: A hundred of small hooks burrowed into the flesh and tormented the victim until it bled out. Surprisingly, the wounds are still weeping brownish liquid with a barely noticeable amethyst hue and an exotic fragrance.

languages.text: 上百个小钩子钻进肉里，一直折磨到受害者流血不止。令人惊讶的是，伤口仍在流出褐色的液体，几乎看不出紫水晶的颜色，还散发着异香。
languages.original_text: A hundred of small hooks burrowed into the flesh and tormented the victim until it bled out. Surprisingly, the wounds are still weeping brownish liquid with a barely noticeable amethyst hue and an exotic fragrance.

languages.text: Un centenar de pequeños garfios se clavaron en la carne y atormentaron a la víctima hasta que se desangró. Sorprendentemente, las heridas siguen supurando un líquido parduzco con un tono amatista apenas perceptible y una fragancia exótica.
languages.original_text: A hundred of small hooks burrowed into the flesh and tormented the victim until it bled out. Surprisingly, the wounds are still weeping brownish liquid with a barely noticeable amethyst hue and an exotic fragrance.

languages.text: 百本の小さな鉤が肉に食い込み、出血するまで被害者を苦しめた。驚いたことに、傷口からはまだ、アメジストの色合いとエキゾチックな香りのする茶色っぽい液体が垂れている。
languages.original_text: A hundred of small hooks burrowed into the flesh and tormented the victim until it bled out. Surprisingly, the wounds are still weeping brownish liquid with a barely noticeable amethyst hue and an exotic fragrance.

languages.text: Yüzlerce küçük kanca ete saplanmış ve kurban kan kaybından ölene kadar ona eziyet etmiştir. Şaşırtıcı bir şekilde, yaralar hala zar zor fark edilebilen ametist tonunda ve egzotik bir kokuya sahip kahverengimsi bir sıvı akıtıyor.
languages.original_text: A hundred of small hooks burrowed into the flesh and tormented the victim until it bled out. Surprisingly, the wounds are still weeping brownish liquid with a barely noticeable amethyst hue and an exotic fragrance.
